sourcePrompt: A Vietnamese rice granary raised on stilts, a small square store about three meters on a side, lifted a full meter off the ground on four stout flared posts that keep rodents and floodwater out. Woven bamboo walls bulge slightly between corner posts, a steep thatched roof caps it, and a short ladder leans up to one small square door. Bamboo, thatch and heavy timber legs, plump and practical.
